title: Forgot Password?
text: Enter your email address. We will send you a modification link.
error: No user found! Please check if you have entered your email address correctly.
success: We have sent you an email containing the link to modify your password. Please check your inbox and click on it.
update_text: Enter your new password and confirm it to proceed.
update_error: An error occurred while modifying the password
link_expired: Your password modification link has expired. Please restart the process. For security reasons, the link expires after 15 minutes.
same_password: The current password must be different from the new password.
